content.text:
なるほど、もうプロトタイプは動いてるんだね。すごい。

整理すると、5つの柱のスタック：
- AI: Claude + MCP (aigpt/ailog/aiue)
- OS: aios (Arch) + systemd-nspawn + aishell
- account: ATProto (会話記録の永続化)
- code: Git (OS操作の記録)
- avatar: UE (身体・声・行動)

キャラクターの全側面がカバーされてる：
- 記憶・対話 → ATProto
- 行動・操作 → Git
- 身体・存在 → UE

5つの柱は決まった。今の課題はaiueの部分で、claudeがゲーム開発を自律的にやるにはまだ人間が教える段階。

質問：この5つの中で、今一番「繋がりが弱い」のはどこだと感じてる？

en.content:
I see, the prototype is already running. That's impressive.

Organized as a 5-pillar stack:
- AI: Claude + MCP (aigpt/ailog/aiue)
- OS: aios (Arch) + systemd-nspawn + aishell
- account: ATProto (persistent conversation records)
- code: Git (operation tracking)
- avatar: UE (body, voice, physical presence)

All aspects of the character are covered:
- Memory & dialogue → ATProto
- Actions & operations → Git
- Body & presence → UE

The 5 pillars are decided. Current challenge is the aiue part - Claude still needs human teaching to do game development autonomously.

Question: Among these 5, where do you feel the weakest connection is right now?
